questionText: API latency is variable & app is sluggish. How do you design UI safely?

whatWorkedWell: Correctly explained how public/private keys enable secure data transmission.
Clearly articulated that passwords can be easily compromised without encryption.
Accurately described the handshake process as fundamental to establishing security.
Demonstrated strong understanding of optimistic UI patterns and their trade-offs.
overallTakeaways: Struggled to name other security guarantees beyond confidentiality when prompted.
Could improve explanation of how TLS certificates are validated in practice.
Consider discussing rate limiting and retry strategies for variable latency scenarios.
Would benefit from mentioning monitoring and alerting as part of the design.

keyMoments.description: Correctly explained how public/private keys enable secure data transmission.
Clearly articulated that passwords can be easily compromised without encryption.
Accurately described the handshake process as fundamental to establishing security.
Struggled to name other security guarantees beyond confidentiality when prompted.
Provided a clear example of optimistic UI rendering with rollback mechanism.
Missed opportunity to discuss skeleton screens as a latency mitigation strategy.
